title: Verify property details are displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the property listing screen. | Verify the address, number of beds, and price are displayed correctly.
expected_result: The address, number of beds, and price are correctly displayed.

title: Verify the back arrow navigates to the previous screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the property listing screen. | Click on the back arrow in the header. | Verify the user is navigated back to the previous screen.
expected_result: The user is navigated back to the previous screen.

title: Verify the share icon opens the sharing options
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the property listing screen. | Click on the share icon in the header. | Verify the sharing options are opened.

title: Verify the image is displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the property listing screen. | Verify the image of the property's entrance is displayed correctly.
expected_result: The image of the property's entrance is displayed correctly.

title: Verify the availability table is displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the property listing screen. | Verify the availability table is displayed correctly.
expected_result: The availability table is displayed correctly.

title: Verify the expenses section is displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the property listing screen. | Verify the expenses section is displayed correctly.
expected_result: The expenses section is displayed correctly.

title: Verify data persistence when navigating away from the screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the property listing screen. | Navigate away from the screen (e.g., to the home screen). | Navigate back to the property listing screen. | Verify the property details are still displayed correctly.
expected_result: The property details are still displayed correctly.

title: Verify the screen is accessible and usable
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the property listing screen. | Perform a screen reader test to ensure all elements are accessible. | Perform a usability test to ensure all elements are usable.
expected_result: All elements are accessible and usable.
